\centry{UNHCR Kenya -- Kakuma Refugee Camp}{Education Program Intern}{Nairobi, Kenya}{June 2018 -- August 2018}
\begin{itemize}
  \item Designed and delivered differentiated English and numeracy curricula for refugee learners ages 10--35 across five proficiency levels, using project-based learning, storytelling, and peer tutoring models
  \item Taught life skills and civic education to secondary students following Kenya's national curriculum framework within the camp's accredited primary schools
  \item Applied trauma-informed and culturally responsive instructional practices to support student engagement and psychological safety in a humanitarian learning environment
\end{itemize}
